meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Project Stalling
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Learn to implement high-converting user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of defined 'activation'—the moment a user realizes value. By implementing a structured, automated onboarding flow using Antigravity for UI scaffolding and Claude Code for logic, you eliminate scope creep and ensure your clients see tangible, shippable results in record time.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a half-finished repo, the client is asking for an update, and your motivation has evaporated into the digital ether. It’s the classic freelancer’s trap: you spent weeks building features nobody asked for, while the core value proposition remains buried under a mountain of unoptimized code. You aren't failing because you lack talent; you are failing because you lack a system.

True mastery isn't about writing more code; it's about shipping the *right* code. By mastering user onboarding, you transform a chaotic build into a guided journey. This checklist bridges the gap between 'stuck in development' and 'deployed to production,' using the industry’s most powerful AI-assisted tools to turn your project graveyard into a portfolio of wins.

steps.title: Define the User's 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the singular action that proves your app provides value. Without this, your onboarding is just noise.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a user journey map for a SaaS onboarding flow that guides the user to the 'Aha!' moment in under 3 minutes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Analyze my current project schema and identify the single most important user action for immediate value realization.'

steps.title: Build the Skeleton UI
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold a clean, non-intrusive onboarding interface that doesn't overwhelm the user.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lightweight, multi-step onboarding modal component using Tailwind CSS that tracks completion progress.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Create a new onboarding component in /components/onboarding.tsx based on the identified user journey.'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent State Management
steps.description: Ensure the app remembers where the user left off so they never have to repeat steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React hook to persist onboarding state to local storage and sync with the database on completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /fix 'Implement a persistent state hook for onboarding that handles user progress across sessions.'

steps.title: Automate Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Use AI to inject help text exactly where the user might encounter friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a configuration file for contextual tooltips that trigger based on user behavior patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'Generate logic to trigger tooltips when a user dwells on a complex form field for more than 5 seconds.'

steps.title: Validate and Deploy
steps.description: Run a final audit to ensure the onboarding flow doesn't break the core app logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of integration tests for the new onboarding flow to ensure it triggers correctly for new users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /test 'Run full integration tests on the onboarding flow and suggest optimizations for performance.'

pro_tips: Never build an onboarding flow that takes more than 3 steps; if you need more, your product is likely too complex.
Use 'Progressive Disclosure'—only show advanced features after the user has successfully completed the core onboarding loop.
Tag your onboarding events in your analytics; if users drop off at step 2, that's your biggest UI bottleneck.
Treat onboarding as a living asset: A/B test your CTA copy every 30 days based on real user session data.
Always include a 'Skip' button. Forcing onboarding on power users is a fast track to churn.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, implement automated email sequences for users who drop off before completion, then move on to optimizing your primary dashboard performance.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting unfinished projects sit in your repo gathering digital dust. You have the tools, the system, and the blueprint to ship high-value software that clients actually pay for. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
